prompts: /plan "we need to fix the extract from realtor.ca listing page in the plugin app. It is scrollable, and has pagination. You can use the sample page at app/plugin/docs/realor.ca_map.html to identify how to scroll and scrape the card details. We will send the card details into the database and include the userId, the siteId ('realtor-ca', realtor-com, zillow)

update the plan so it sends a page of properties at a time to the bulk import based on pagination. We want the data to show up in the user interface a page at a time as well when scrapping all the property cards from the listing page, if we could do it in real-time to add the cards or have a call back or something similar for each page full of properties added that would be excellect.
update docs and push to git
